headline: Jim Cramer Calls KLA Corporation “Too Risky”
summary: KLA Corporation (NASDAQ:KLAC) was among the stocks Jim Cramer highlighted during Mad Money, as he noted the rotation into defensive sectors. Cramer discussed the stock during the episode, as he commented: Then we go back to the semiconductor space. Here it is, KLA. That’s the second one, too risky. KLA and AMAT, on the way […]
